title: Festivals & events
subtitle: 38 celebrations through the year — pick a day to see what's on.

festivals.name: New Year's Day
festivals.description: National public holiday marking the start of the new year with celebrations across all of Fiji.

festivals.name: Fiji Day
festivals.description: National public holiday celebrating Fiji's independence with parades, cultural performances, and festivities nationwide.

festivals.name: Bula Festival
festivals.description: One of Fiji's largest festivals featuring float parades, live music, traditional performances, and cultural celebrations in the heart of Nadi.

festivals.name: Holi Festival of Colours
festivals.description: Hindu festival celebrated across Fiji where people throw colored powder and water, celebrated particularly in Indo-Fijian communities.

festivals.name: Easter
festivals.description: Christian holiday observed as a public holiday in Fiji with church services and family gatherings throughout the islands.

festivals.name: Prophet Muhammad's Birthday (Mawlid)
festivals.description: Islamic religious observance celebrated by Muslim communities across Fiji with prayers and gatherings.

festivals.name: Diwali Festival of Lights
festivals.description: Hindu festival of lights celebrated with fireworks, lanterns, and family gatherings, particularly vibrant in Indo-Fijian communities.

festivals.name: Christmas Day
festivals.description: Major Christian holiday observed nationwide with church services, family celebrations, and festive decorations across all regions.

festivals.name: Boxing Day
festivals.description: Public holiday following Christmas, celebrated with sporting events, family outings, and community activities.

festivals.name: Suva City Festival
festivals.description: Annual festival celebrating Suva's culture with street parades, live performances, food stalls, and cultural exhibitions.

festivals.name: Labasa Festival
festivals.description: Regional celebration in Labasa featuring cultural shows, local cuisine, and community festivities showcasing northern Fijian culture.

festivals.name: Ratu Sukuna Day
festivals.description: Public holiday honoring the revered Fijian chief and statesman Ratu Sukuna with cultural events and ceremonies.

festivals.name: Hibiscus Festival
festivals.description: Festival celebrating Fiji's national flower with beauty pageants, cultural performances, and festivities in the Levuka region.

festivals.name: Savusavu Regatta
festivals.description: Traditional boat racing event in Savusavu combining maritime heritage with community celebrations and water sports.

festivals.name: Pacific Festival of Arts
festivals.description: Major regional arts festival showcasing Pacific Island cultures through music, dance, crafts, and traditional performances held occasionally in Fiji.

festivals.name: Banasutva Festival
festivals.description: Community festival in the western region celebrating local traditions, foods, and cultural heritage with traditional performances.

festivals.name: Lautoka Flower Festival
festivals.description: Festival celebrating Lautoka's sugar and agricultural heritage with flower displays, parades, cultural shows, and local entertainment.

festivals.name: Youth Day
festivals.description: Public holiday celebrating Fiji's youth with sports events, educational activities, and community programs nationwide.

festivals.name: National Day of Prayer
festivals.description: Public holiday dedicated to prayer and spiritual reflection across Fiji's diverse religious communities.

festivals.name: Coral Coast Festival
festivals.description: Celebration of the Coral Coast region featuring water sports, traditional performances, and cultural exhibitions.

festivals.name: Navala Food Festival
festivals.description: Festival celebrating traditional Fijian cuisine and cooking methods with food stalls, cultural performances, and culinary demonstrations.

festivals.name: Ovalau Festival
festivals.description: Regional festival celebrating the historic island of Ovalau with cultural shows, traditional crafts, and community gatherings.

festivals.name: Namosi Agricultural Festival
festivals.description: Festival celebrating rural agriculture and village life with traditional foods, farming demonstrations, and cultural performances.

festivals.name: Vunisea Sea Festival
festivals.description: Festival celebrating maritime heritage and fishing traditions in the eastern islands with boat races and seafood celebrations.

festivals.name: Kadavu Turtle Festival
festivals.description: Festival dedicated to marine conservation and Kadavu's unique sea turtle populations with educational activities and cultural performances.

festivals.name: Vanua Levu Harvest Festival
festivals.description: Agricultural celebration showcasing the northern island's harvest with traditional foods, farming displays, and cultural entertainment.

festivals.name: Taveuni Waterfall Festival
festivals.description: Festival celebrating Taveuni's natural beauty and waterfalls with eco-tourism activities, cultural shows, and outdoor adventures.

festivals.name: Rewa River Festival
festivals.description: Festival celebrating Fiji's longest river with traditional boat races, cultural performances, and river-based activities.

festivals.name: Western Music Festival
festivals.description: Celebration of contemporary and traditional Fijian music with live performances by local and regional artists in Nadi.

festivals.name: Suva Live Music Festival
festivals.description: Annual showcase of live music featuring local and international artists performing across multiple venues in Fiji's capital.

festivals.name: Colo-i-Suva Forest Festival
festivals.description: Environmental and cultural festival celebrating the rainforest with nature walks, indigenous performances, and conservation awareness.

festivals.name: Tavua Gold Festival
festivals.description: Festival celebrating the region's gold mining heritage with exhibitions, cultural performances, and community celebrations.

festivals.name: Rakiraki Sugarcane Festival
festivals.description: Festival celebrating the important sugarcane industry with displays of agricultural practices, traditional demonstrations, and food.

festivals.name: Yasawa Islands Festival
festivals.description: Festival celebrating the unique culture and natural beauty of the Yasawa Islands chain with traditional performances and island activities.

festivals.name: Lomaiviti Cultural Festival
festivals.description: Festival showcasing the traditions of the Lomaiviti island group with traditional dances, crafts, and cultural ceremonies.

festivals.name: Koro Sea Fishing Festival
festivals.description: Festival celebrating traditional fishing methods and maritime culture with boat races, seafood feasts, and fishing competitions.

festivals.name: Indo-Fijian Heritage Month
festivals.description: Month-long celebration of Indo-Fijian contributions to Fijian society with cultural performances, exhibitions, and community events.

festivals.name: Fiji Cuture Fair
festivals.description: Annual showcase of traditional crafts, arts, music, and cultural displays representing all regions of Fiji.
